heading: Everything you need to actually learn
subheading: Not just diagrams. Not just pseudocode. Real animations tied to real code, step by step.

items.title: Visual step-by-step execution
items.description: Watch every comparison, swap, and traversal in real time as it happens.

items.title: Code alongside the visual
items.description: See the exact lines executing as the animation plays — no gap between theory and code.

items.title: 4 complete algorithm categories
items.description: Sorting, searching, data structures, and dynamic programming — all in one place.

items.title: Multiple language implementations
items.description: JavaScript, Python, Java, C++ — pick what you know and learn in context.
